overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in futuristic gear with a large backpack traversing a desolate, foggy mountain valley. The character walks steadily through volcanic terrain with dark soil and scattered rocks, transitioning from an enclosed valley to an open misty plateau.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain valley path between steep slopes

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the mountain valley carrying a large backpack, navigating between rocky outcrops

entered.detail: steep dark volcanic mountainside forming the left wall of the valley
steep rocky mountainside forming the right wall of the valley
prominent gray rock formation in the middle of the path
fog-shrouded mountain summit visible at the end of the valley
narrow dirt and gravel path winding through the volcanic terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow mountain valley enclosed by steep dark slopes on both sides. The path is rocky and uneven, with large boulders scattered along the way. The sky is partially visible above the ridge lines, and a distant foggy peak marks the end of the valley ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: mountain crest overlooking foggy valley basin

events.description: character crests the ridge and the view opens into a wide fog-filled valley below
visibility decreases as the character enters a thicker fog layer on the descent

agents.ego_description: carefully descending the slope while approaching the foggy valley floor, maintaining balance on the uneven terrain

entered.detail: mist-covered valley basin stretching out below the ridge
rocky precipice marking the edge of the descending path
jagged rock formation protruding from the right hillside
smoke-emitting mountain visible through the haze in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the crest of the ridge, revealing a vast foggy valley below. The enclosed valley walls give way to an open vista with limited visibility due to mist. The path descends toward the fog-covered basin, with rocky outcroppings lining the route and distant volcanic peaks barely visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: open volcanic plateau with scattered rock formations

agents.ego_description: traversing the open plateau, navigating around scattered rock clusters while heading toward the distant misty horizon

entered.detail: expansive flat area of dark volcanic soil and ash
tall isolated rock spire rising from the plateau floor
vague building or ruin barely visible through the distant fog
groups of medium-sized boulders dotting the landscape

segments.scene_description: The character moves across the open volcanic plateau, surrounded by scattered rock formations and pinnacles. The terrain is flatter here but still uneven with loose rocks. The fog persists in the distance, obscuring the horizon, while the character continues along the winding path through the desolate landscape.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character traverses a narrow, enclosed mountain pass that gradually opens into a vast, desolate volcanic plateau. It begins with the character navigating a rocky, uneven path hemmed in by steep dark slopes, moving toward a distant foggy peak. As the character reaches the crest of the ridge, the confining valley walls give way to an expansive vista, shifting the perspective toward a fog-covered basin and distant volcanic peaks. The scene then expands further as the path descends from the ridge onto a flatter, open plateau characterized by scattered rock formations and pinnacles. Finally, the camera follows the character along a winding route through the loose volcanic soil, with a persistent haze obscuring the horizon of the desolate landscape.
